title: Manually update Session in Time Tracking Column on Mobile
excerpt:
On mobile, there’s no option to manually add time sessions in the time tracking column, as there is in desktop. 
We’d love the ability to be able to manually add in sessions as opposed to having to track entries in real …

posts.author: rfl93 (R)
posts.cookedHtml:
On mobile, there’s no option to manually add time sessions in the time tracking column, as there is in desktop.

We’d love the ability to be able to manually add in sessions as opposed to having to track entries in real time.

Screenshot 2024-11-13 122336406×291 5.57 KB
